about.heroDescription: Koreys tili — orzuingizga olib boradigan yo'lning boshlanishi.
about.missionDescription1: Koreys tilini o'rganishning ko'plab usullari mavjud. Amazing Korean koreys tilini amaliy va samarali o'rgatadi.
about.missionDescription2: Barcha grammatika va iboralarni o'rganish shart emas. Eng ko'p ishlatiladigan asosiy 500 ta gapdan boshlaylik.
about.missionDescription3: Sizning tilingizdagi 500 ta gap bilan TOPIK va EPS-TOPIK-ga tayyorlanish qiyin bo'lmaydi.
about.missionDescription4: Amazing Korean — koreys tilini o'rganishning boshlanishi.
about.missionComingSoon: Video darslar, AI talaffuz tuzatish va mobil ilova ham tayyorlanmoqda.
about.valueDescription: An'anaviy ta'limdan farq qiluvchi 3 ta yondashuv
about.valueAcquisitionDesc: Koreys tili qiyin emas. Asosiy grammatika va gap tuzilmasini bilsangiz, koreys tilini oson ishlatishingiz mumkin. Amazing Korean o'rganishdan oshib, o'zlashtirishga imkon beradigan asosiy 500 ta gapni taqdim etadi.
about.valueEfficiencyDesc: An'anaviy ta'lim faqat koreys tilini o'rgatishga qaratilgan. Amazing Korean TOPIK va EPS-TOPIK-ga erishishni maqsad qiladi. Optimal yo'nalish bilan vaqtni qisqartiramiz. Bundan tashqari, Amazing Korean sizni koreys tilini chindan ham yaxshi bilishga yetkazadi.
about.valueUnderstandingDesc: Koreys tilini koreys tilida o'rganish kerak. Lekin koreys tilini bilmasdan faqat koreys tilida o'rganish oson emas. Amazing Korean tushunishni osonlashtirish uchun 34 tilni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi. O'z tilingizda koreys tilini tushuning va o'rganishni boshlang.
about.ctaDescription: Bepul ro'yxatdan o'ting va koreys tilini o'rganishni boshlang.

study.listDescription: Dasturga mos o'quv topshiriqlari orqali koreys tili ko'nikmalaringizni tizimli ravishda oshiring. Talaffuzdan TOPIK gacha turli xil ta'lim kontentini taqdim etamiz.
study.emptyDescription: Tanlangan dastur uchun hali o'quv topshiriqlari yo'q.
study.emptyDetailDescription: Bu o'quv uchun hali topshiriqlar ro'yxatdan o'tmagan.
study.notFoundDescription: Bu topshiriq mavjud emas yoki o'chirilgan.

lesson.listDescription: Tizimli tashkil etilgan darslar orqali koreys tilini bosqichma-bosqich o'rganing. Videolar, topshiriqlar va vazifalarni o'z ichiga olgan integratsiyalashgan darslarni taqdim etamiz.
lesson.emptyItemsDescription: Bu dars uchun hali o'quv elementlari ro'yxatdan o'tmagan.
lesson.notFoundDescription: Bu dars mavjud emas yoki o'chirilgan.

video.listDescription: Turli mavzulardagi koreys videolari orqali tabiiy ravishda o'rganing. Ona tili talaffuzi va iboralarini eshitib, ko'nikmalaringizni oshiring.
video.notFoundDescription: Bu video mavjud emas yoki o'chirilgan.

bookHub.title: Koreys tili darsligi
bookHub.subtitle: 22 tilda mavjud koreys tilini o'rganish darsliklarini kashf eting
bookHub.slideDesc0:
Amazing Korean makes learning Korean easy.
You can understand Korean in any of 22 languages.
Amazing Korean Basics is the first step to study TOPIK and EPS-TOPIK.
From pronunciation to basic grammar, sentence structure, and 500 sentences to build your Korean foundation.
bookHub.slideDesc1:
Learn Korean consonants and vowels by writing and speaking them.
Systematically study the combination principles of 14 consonants and 21 vowels.
Practice writing with stroke order guides while mastering accurate pronunciation.
Learn complex characters like double consonants and compound vowels step by step.
bookHub.slideDesc2:
Korean pronunciation is organized by characteristics with key vocabulary to help you learn easily.
Covers major phonological rules including liaison, tensification, aspiration, and nasalization.
Practice natural pronunciation with frequently used real-life vocabulary.
Learn to understand and accurately reproduce Korean speakers' pronunciation patterns.
bookHub.slideDesc3:
Master Korean tenses and particles through foundational vocabulary and expressions.
Learn essential particles like 은/는, 이/가, 을/를 and past, present, and future tenses.
Practice real usage through example sentences and exercises for each grammar point.
Naturally learn the characteristics of Korean word order (Subject-Object-Verb).
bookHub.slideDesc4:
500 essential sentences built from commonly used
Korean expressions to help you master the basics.
Organized by frequency and difficulty, learn from
important grammar to complex expressions step by step.
bookHub.slideDesc5:
Frequently used and complex grammar points organized in tables for quick reference.
Covers tricky topics like irregular conjugations, formal/informal speech, and connective endings.
Serves as a grammar dictionary you can refer to anytime during your studies.
Systematically presents key grammar frequently appearing in Korean language exams.
